title: Knocking on Quantum’s Door: QuiX Claims Photonic Error Reduction Breakthrough
snippet: The Netherlands-based company says it has achieved below-threshold error mitigation in a photonic quantum system – a milestone tied directly to fault-tolerant quantum computing and one that could significantly reduce th…
contentText: The Netherlands-based company says it has achieved below-threshold error mitigation in a photonic quantum system – a milestone tied directly to fault-tolerant quantum computing and one that could significantly reduce the infrastructure footprint required to scale.

title: How Can You Tell if a Piece of Writing Was Generated by AI?

contentText: CEO of Pangram Labs, Max Spero joins Tracy Alloway and Joe Weisenthal on the Odd Lots podcast to discuss the software his company built to detect whether a piece of content was AI generated. We also talk about what AI writing means for the future of the internet. (Source: Bloomberg)
